title: centranthera cochinchinensis subsp. lutea
intro: Centranthera cochinchinensis subsp. lutea, commonly known as the yellow centranthera, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centranthera cochinchinensis subsp. lutea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it accessible for various traditional medicine applications.
